name: env-nix-devshell
description: Activate a Nix flake or shell.nix devshell for workspace subprocesses

settings.label: Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Maximum time to wait for `nix print-dev-env`. Cold flake evaluations on a fresh checkout — especially with substituters disabled or large transitive closures — can exceed 90 seconds; consider raising to 300 for slow networks. Per-repo overrides live in Repo Settings → Environment.
